notes: This repository keeps the clean Orchestrion-enabled rules_go base fork in-tree at third_party/rules_go_orchestrion.
The optional consumer patch bundle lives in third_party/rules_go_patches and the exact-tree proof lives in third_party/rules_go_patched_tree_manifest.json.
Use the generator to compare the vendored tree against the pinned upstream base commit and regenerate the checked-in changed-files report.
